visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a ponytail, wearing a blue and white striped shirt and dark skirt, kneels on a wooden floor in a well-lit bedroom. She is actively pulling items from a white shelving unit into a large clear plastic bag. (2) She picks up a thick binder and begins flipping through pages of certificates and old photographs with a cheerful expression. She reaches into a lower shelf, retrieving a small brown box and an orange notebook, showing them to the camera while laughing. (3) The camera captures her sitting among various cardboard boxes and piles of papers. She holds the orange notebook close, smiling widely and shaking her head as if refusing a request. (4) Moving to a large black storage bag, she pulls out a heavy, black-bound photo album. As she opens it, the pages reveal architectural photos. She interacts with the person filming, exhibiting high energy and amusement. (5) She opens the bottom drawer of a wooden dresser, searching through clothes and documents. She pulls out a few cards and letters, holding them up and laughing while continuing the conversation with the off-camera individual.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 好 回來舊家. [Logo]: 北港舊家斷捨離. [Slogan]: 挖出歷任前男友情書!!! (2) [Variety]: 想要毀屍滅跡喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 叫你不要來你還來. (4) [Subtitle]: 留著吧 還有一些獎狀呢. (5) [Subtitle]: 你這輩子不會再拿獎狀了. (6) [Subtitle]: 下一張應該就是那個 模範媽媽. (7) [Subtitle]: 來 是什麼. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是以前的那個寫真. (9) [Subtitle]: 哇 你尺度很大耶. (10) [Subtitle]: 這是前男友的交換日記. (11) [Variety]: 妳不要把初戀前男友交換日記的習慣 帶到下一任啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 隨便念兩句來聽聽看. (13) [Subtitle]: 第三頁的第二句這樣就好了. (14) [Subtitle]: 1 2 3. (15) [Subtitle]: 好 第二句 唸. (16) [Subtitle]: 不要 太羞了. (17) [Subtitle]: 唸啦 是他寫給你的耶. (18) [Subtitle]: 不要 我再幫妳逼掉. (19) [Subtitle]: 婚紗照一整本在這裡卡陰. (20) [Subtitle]: 灰塵塵蟎 是我們的婚紗嗎. (21) [Subtitle]: 妳打開結果是狗先生. (22) [Subtitle]: 沒有啦. (23) [Variety]: 有夠沒水準 在這裡長灰塵啦 可憐啦. (24) [Subtitle]: 這個是你的. (25) [Subtitle]: 我的 怎麼有我的東西. (26) [Subtitle]: 我的情書喔. (27) [Subtitle]: 妹不要給我丟掉 跟雜物放在一起啦. (28) [Subtitle]: 你看你的還有收在那個櫃子裡耶. (29) [Subtitle]: 差點要丟掉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a young woman with dark hair tied in a high ponytail. She wears a horizontal blue and white striped short-sleeved t-shirt and a dark blue knee-length skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical home bedroom with light wood flooring. There is a white bookshelf filled with books and containers, a wooden desk with a computer monitor, and a dresser with multiple drawers. A full-length mirror is also visible in the corner.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, energetic pop music with a strong electronic beat. A young female voice speaks rapidly with high pitch variability and frequent laughter, accompanied by a male voice off-camera who teases her in a playful tone. (2) As the female continues to laugh, the sound of paper flipping and plastic rustling is clearly audible. The male voice maintains a moderate volume, exhibiting a humorous and commanding yet friendly tone. (3) A loud thud occurs as a heavy object is moved, followed by more intense laughter from both individuals. The background music remains constant in tempo. (4) The male voice expresses surprise with a slightly higher pitch as he discovers his own items. The interplay between the two voices is dense, with overlapping speech and continuous positive emotional valence throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video document a humorous and nostalgic 'decluttering' session where a woman finds old memorabilia, including love letters and exchange diaries from past relationships, leading to playful teasing from her partner/friend filming.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high speech density and frequent laughter contribute to a high-energy, engaging viewer experience typical of social media vlogs.
